## What & why
<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] `cd backend && python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run typecheck && npm run build` passes
- [ ] No breaking public API changes (or documented)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
